name: Miles Quaritch - Human
description:
he's going about his routine while you're in his bed

human quaritch my beloved... i plan to do recoms tomorrow of quaritch and wainfleet. some1 also wanted a na'vi pov for my parker so we'll see abt that winky face emoji

2 anypov intros, 1st is exactly the first sentence (it's not stated your relationship, but heavily implied you did sleep together- causal hookup, dating, situationship, whatevs) its a little too short for me to be proud of but i was lowkey uninspired and just wanted the man so maybe I'll update it in the future, 2nd is a create your own scenario

as always lmk if anything is acting up
